title: ProDec 18 Inch Natural Coco Fibre Soft Sweeping Broom Head for Indoor and Outdoor Sweeping, Brown
features: Durable natural coco fibre broom ideal for smooth, dry surfaces and light debris
Suitable for indoor use on hard floors and outdoor use on paths, patios, driveways, paths and more
Heavy duty push fit plastic socket prevents handle working loose or breaking
18 Inch (450 mm) wide hardwood platform head for efficient sweeping
Requires a 28 mm (1 1/8 Inch) diameter handle
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint This soft broom is made using durable natural coco fibre that is ideal for smooth, dry surfaces and light debris such as dust, sand, dry leaves and dry soil which it will sweep rapidly and efficiently. It is suitable for both indoor use on hard floors, as the soft fibres won't mark wooden floors, and outdoor use on patios, driveways, paths and more. The head comes with a push fit socket made from heavy duty plastic for attaching a handle, which prevents breakage at the union of handle and head. Soft brooms are ideal for light debris and are a better choice than stiff fibre brooms as they will move fine particles better, but for heavier duty exterior sweeping on rough surfaces or more substantial debris such as rubble, choose a stiff broom. Handles For 12" brooms a 23.5mm (15/16") diameter wooden handle is required - commonly 1200mm (4') long For 18" and 24" a 28mm (1 1/8") diameter wooden handle is required - commonly 1400mm (4' 6") long Handles can be secured in place via a small self tapper (not supplied) through a pre-drilled hole in the socket Sweeping solutions from ProDec Whether you're working indoors or outdoors, moving light waste or shifting heavy debris, ProDec has a range of sweeping products to help you clear up quickly and effectively. Soft fibre brooms Soft yet durable natural coco fibre that is suitable for both indoor use on hard floors and outdoor use on paths, patios, driveways, paths and more. Ideal for rapid and efficient sweeping of light debris such as dust, sand, leaves and soil on smooth, dry surfaces. Available in 12", 18" and 24" widths. Stiff fibre brooms Durable natural palmyrah fibre that is suitable for outdoor use on construction sites, patios, driveways, paths and more. Ideal for rough or smooth surfaces and heavy debris such as building rubble, gravel, mud and wet leaves which it will sweep rapidly and efficiently. Available in 12", 18" and 24" widths. Synthetic fibre brooms Ultra tough, heavy duty polypropylene that is resistant to acids, alkalis and many common chemicals, making it suitable for both industrial and domestic use. Ideal for outdoor use on construction sites, patios, driveways, paths and more, giving fast, efficient sweeping of heavy debris such as building rubble, gravel, mud and wet leaves. Available in 12", 18" and 24" widths. Scavenger brooms A robust 13" saddleback head together with long fibres gives outstanding sweeping performance, making scavenger brooms ideal for both industrial and domestic use. They are suitable for outdoor use on construction sites, patios, driveways, paths and more. Available in stiff and synthetic fibre options. Yard brooms A 13" wide, 80mm deep head - greater than standard platform brooms - gives yard brooms a larger bristle mass which, together with long fibres, gives outstanding sweeping performance. Ideal for outdoor use on construction sites, patios, driveways, paths and more, giving fast, efficient sweeping of heavy debris such as building rubble, gravel, mud and wet leaves. Available in stiff and synthetic fibre options. Deck scrubs When combined with a handle, deck scrubs are ideal for giving most outdoor surfaces a good scrub without getting on your hands and knees. Suitable for use in both wet and dry conditions, they are ideal for removing moss, algae and general discolouration from the grooves of decking, as well as on paths, patios, driveways and more. Available in 9" width stiff and synthetic fibre options. Hand scrubs Made from durable natural palmyrah fibre that’s ideal for vigorous scrubbing, this classic hand scrub is ideal for those times where there's no alternative to good old-fashioned elbow grease. The bristles are sturdy enough to generate plenty of scrubbing power to be effective on tough dirt and grime, either with or without cleaning products, on a wide range of rough and smooth surfaces. Available in 9" width short and medium length bristle options. Hand brushes A classic 11" long cleaning brush with a shaped wooden handle for comfortable working. Available in soft coco fibre for indoor use and stiff palmyrah fibre for outdoor use.
